prompt: A realistic 16:9 close-up photograph of a sheet of slightly textured white paper resting diagonally on a medium-brown wooden table, viewed from a shallow overhead angle. On the paper, a short French poem is handwritten neatly in elegant cursive with vivid blue ink. The title at the top center reads Pigeon. Beneath it are exactly 4 lines of handwriting, centered and evenly spaced: Oiseau à la grise robe,, Dans l'enfer des villes, "À mon regard tu te dérobes", and "Tu es vraiment le plus agile." Keep the handwriting graceful, legible, and natural, like careful fountain-pen calligraphy by hand rather than typography. Soft warm indoor lighting, subtle shadows along the paper edges, visible paper grain, and a simple uncluttered composition focused entirely on the handwritten poem.
